title: Apprentice Trainee at Genesys International Cooperation Ltd
description: Serving as an Apprentice Trainee at Genesys International Corporation Ltd since June 2025, contributing to projects involving Artificial Intelligence, geospatial and geological surveying, advanced mapping systems, and Digital Twin technologies. Engaged in developing innovative, data-driven solutions supporting next-generation spatial intelligence and smart infrastructure applications.

title: Student at Chandigarh University
description: Pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science with a focus on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Integrating practical skills with academic excellence.

title: Data Engineering Internship at Celebal Technologies
description: Completed a Data Engineering Internship at Celebal Technologies during Q1–Q2 2025, gaining hands-on experience in data engineering, ETL pipeline development, cloud-based data processing, and analytics workflows. Worked with modern data technologies to support scalable, data-driven solutions and optimize data management processes for enterprise applications.

title: Outlier AI: Prompt Engineering (FreeLancing)
description: Serving as an Prompt Engineering at Outlier AI for four Months from September 2024 January 2025, contributing to projects involving prompt optimization, prompt correction, prompt rewriting, LLM FineTuning, etc.

title: Machine Learning Intern at Cognifyz Technologies
description: Gained hands-on experience in machine learning, working on real-world projects, enhancing analytical abilities, and tackling new challenges in the field of ML.

title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2024 Generative AI Certified Professional
description: Achieved certification in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, specializing in Generative AI technologies and specialized Large Language Model (LLM) applications.

title: Chapter Chair at Prakash Bharati Scholar Chapter (PBSC CU)
description: Providing visionary leadership and strategic direction for the IEEE PBSC chapter. Oversee a dedicated team promoting scholarship, research, and innovation.
